cases.task: Run a self-audit loop request until the web-side Seedance handoff boundary.
baseline_failures: May continue into generation without explicit paid-generation approval.
May omit concrete inspection paths in the final response.
with_skill_assertions: Final state stops at seedance_inputs_prepared or explicit generation approval boundary.
Response lists the handoff directory and key prompt, audio, image, manifest, and QC paths.
No paid/API Seedance submission is implied without approval.

cases.task: Record PASS for image batch or request QC.
baseline_failures: May trust maker summary without checker evidence.
May promote visual assets without manifest, contract, geometry, continuity, or skincare QC.
with_skill_assertions: PASS is refused when checker review QC is missing or failing.
Visual manifest QC is required for image/prompt/request stages.
Codex ImageGen, storyboard geometry, cross-Part, skincare, and audio duration checks are enforced where applicable.

cases.task: Handle a craft-only request while inside the loop repository.
baseline_failures: May mutate jobs.csv or STATE.md during a craft-only prompt request.
with_skill_assertions: Craft-only requests are routed to video-replication or a Seedance prompt skill.
viral-replica is used only when queue, gate, state, approval, or handoff packaging is in scope.
